name: resize_pblock
short_description: Move, resize, add and remove Pblock site-range constraints
full_help:
resize_pblock

Description: 
Move, resize, add and remove Pblock site-range constraints

Syntax: 
resize_pblock  [-add <args>] [-remove <args>] [-from <args>] [-to <args>]
               [-replace] [-locs <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <pblock>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-add]      Add site/tile ranges(s)
  [-remove]   Remove site/tile ranges(s)
  [-from]     Site range(s) to move
  [-to]       Site range destination(s)
  [-replace]  Remove all existing ranges
  [-locs]     LOC treatment
              Default: keep_all
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <pblock>    Pblock to resize

Categories: 
Floorplan, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
